headline: DAT: Higher fuel costs lifted April truckload rates; freight volumes eased
summary: Spot Market Volume & Rates: Van Higher fuel costs lifted April truckload rates; freight volumes eased PORTLAND, Ore., May 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Truckload spot and contract rates climbed sharply in April, but the gains came almost entirely from higher fuel costs, reported DAT Freight & Analytics, provider of the industry's leading load board and freight analytics.
